name: trinity
description: Trinity Local — ask all three, keep what works. Local-first cross-provider councils across Claude, Codex, and Gemini: a chairman synthesizes the verdict, an opt-in taste lens personalizes it, smart routing picks the winner.

plugins.name: trinity-local
plugins.description: Cross-provider councils, a taste lens, and smart routing — local-first. Registers the Trinity MCP server and adds /trinity-local:council, :ask, and :lens.
